name: ml-platform-architecture
prompt: Simple MLOps platform diagram in Google Cloud Architecture style. White background. Three horizontal layers labeled "Data Ingestion" → "Model Training" → "Deployment". Each layer has 3-4 small rectangular boxes with minimal text. Thin grey connecting lines. Small GCP/AWS/Azure logos at 20% opacity in corner. One ember orange (#D95B43) accent highlighting the "AutoML" component. Clean Inter font. Generous white space. No gradients or 3D effects.
